role: Pure-Rust Cargo workspace (8 crates) that declaratively manages this dual-RTX-5090 box: env-manager (engine+cli+gui — TOML components; verbs auto-detect/install/auto-fix/reset/doctor/dashboard) + secrets stack (secrets-engine pure-Rust vault, secretd/secretctl gRPC, libSQL remote). It owns the meta environment boundary — PATH, dotfiles, ~/.local, and the canonical home tree (envctl/home, ADR-0006) that ~/.claude/{settings.json,CLAUDE.md,RTK.md} and meta/settings.json symlink into; it holds secrets and auto-injects them on demand.
northstar: envctl owns and contains the meta environment: every FlexNetOS tool/dotfile/.local/bin resolves inside meta; user-global ($HOME/.local, ~/.claude) holds ONLY symlinks into meta; envctl exports META_ROOT (resolved from the .meta.yaml marker, like meta_core's META_DATA_DIR) so no config hardcodes paths; secrets are held and auto-injected. Heal not harm; never downgrade; never delete (archive).
next_command: Plan in kb first (git kb board); mint execution cards via hf (ADR-0003). CURRENT MISSION = runaway-session containment (2026-06-12). NEXT UNIT: env-ownership build-out — add `envctl env` to export META_ROOT from the .meta.yaml marker (reuse engine::dashboard::locate_meta_file), own PATH to meta tool dirs, idempotently regenerate ~/.local/bin symlinks from META_ROOT, and heal the 3 remaining hardcoded settings.json refs (statusline + 2 marketplace dirs). THEN Phase-2 tool relocation, never-downgrade (sync meta source up to the installed version FIRST: kasetto 3.0.0<3.1.0, rtk 0.42.0<0.42.2; git-kb/forge provenance unresolved; rtk is hook-critical = supervised).
loop: .handoff/loop/ — ACTIVE loop = env-ownership + Phase-2 tool relocation (backlog.md, loop_state.md); the auto-loop delivers from this witnessed backlog. The prior dashboard forge-loop (terminal-DONE 2026-06-05, migrated from deprecated _workspace/ per HARNESS-UPGRADE-KIT v2 / ADR-0004) is archived in loop/_done/.
done_this_mission: ICM recursion root-cause fixed + live (icm 9da001d, 232 tests); SessionEnd hook re-enabled safely (envctl 757707c); settings tool-hooks de-hardcoded to bare-name-via-PATH (envctl 2bf6a28).
